data.title: Write RED test asserting Integration Setup section (Jira, Figma, Confluence) in INSTALL.md and preservation of prior content
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Purpose
Write a RED test asserting INSTALL.md contains an Integration Setup section with Jira, Figma, and Confluence subsections per the story's done definitions, AND that all earlier INSTALL.md content from story 3028-d955 is preserved.

## File Impact
- tests/test-install-integration-setup.sh — CREATE
- .test-index — EDIT (add RED marker)

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/test-install-integration-setup.sh (executable).
2. Assertions:
   - INSTALL.md contains `## Integration Setup`
   - INSTALL.md contains `### Jira` subsection heading
   - Jira subsection mentions API token
   - Jira subsection mentions user email
   - Jira subsection mentions JIRA_URL (env var or the phrase "Jira base URL")
   - Jira subsection links to the Atlassian API token guide (support.atlassian.com/atlassian-account/docs/manage-api-tokens-for-your-atlassian-account)
   - INSTALL.md contains `### Figma` subsection heading
   - Figma subsection mentions personal access token (or FIGMA_PAT)
   - Figma subsection links to help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/8085703771159-Manage-personal-access-tokens
   - INSTALL.md contains `### Confluence` subsection heading with a placeholder sentence stating the integration is planned (grep for a phrase like "planned" or "not yet")
   - Earlier content preserved: still contains `/plugin marketplace add navapbc/digital-service-orchestra`
   - Still contains `/plugin install dso@digital-service-orchestra`
   - Still contains `## Prerequisites`
   - Still contains `## Installation`
   - Still contains `## Optional Dependencies`
   - Still contains `/dso:onboarding`
3. Verify test fails (Integration Setup section does not yet exist).
4. Add `[test_install_integration_setup]` RED marker to .test-index for INSTALL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] tests/test-install-integration-setup.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/test-install-integration-setup.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) before Integration Setup section is added
  Verify: ! bash tests/test-install-integration-setup.sh
- [ ] RED marker in .test-index
  Verify: grep -F '[test_install_integration_setup]' .test-index
